title: RED CARDS - 211info
text: IMMIGRANT LEGAL RESOURCE CENTER RED CARDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general immigration rights information that can be printed on wallet-sized cards. Red Cards give examples of how people can exercise these rights in real situations, such as when ICE agents go to a home. Does not provide individualized legal advice. Website San Francisco, CA 94103 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Printed cards are available in: Amharic, Arabic, Chinese, English, Farsi, French, Haitian Creole, Hmong, Khmer, Korean, Pashto, Portuguese, Punjabi, Russian, Spanish, Tagalog, Tigrinya, Ukrainian, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Internet Information Resources * Immigration Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
